name: Credicorp Cap Asset Mgmt Sa Administra - Fondo de Inversion Credicorp Capital Alto Rendimiento CLP
summary: Credicorp Cap Asset Mgmt Sa Administra - Fondo de Inversion Credicorp Capital Alto Rendimiento CLP is a high-yield investment fund denominated in Chilean pesos (CLP). It is managed by Credicorp Capital Asset Management SA Administradora and focuses on generating returns through higher-yielding investments.
